overall.description: A cinematic game engine render of a grand gothic great hall reminiscent of a magical school dining hall, featuring floating candles, long wooden dining tables with seated figures, and warm sunlight streaming through tall arched windows. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the atmospheric interior with stone columns and high vaulted ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and long dining tables

notable_agents.action: walking from left to right across the back of the hall behind the dining tables

hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
wooden banquet tables lined with seated figures
tall gothic arched windows with sunlight streaming through
high stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a stationary view of a grand gothic great hall with floating candles illuminating the space. Long dining tables fill the center where numerous figures are seated. A single robed NPC walks across the left side of the hall from background to foreground, while warm afternoon light streams through the tall arched windows at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, atmospheric view of a grand gothic great hall bathed in the warm glow of afternoon light. It begins with a wide perspective of the vaulted space, where floating candles cast a soft light over long dining tables filled with seated figures. As the scene unfolds, a single robed figure emerges from the background and walks steadily across the left side of the hall toward the foreground. The composition remains fixed, allowing the movement of the NPC to contrast with the stillness of the stone columns and the steady streams of sunlight pouring through the distant arched windows.
